title: Experiment of Electrical Technology
description: Experiment of Electrical Technology consists of experiments in circuit analysis, analog circuits, digital circuits, hybrid analog and digital circuits, and the application of FPGA, as well as comprehensive design of application systems. Students will not only study the principle of these experiments, but also design, research, and practice them. The lab work will equip students with skills in electronic experiments, a scientific mindset and workstyle, and capability to independently analyze and tackle issues. Covering basic, comprehensive, and challenging contents, the course will help undergraduates foster innovation and be able to address complex engineering problems. Let's work together to start this journey of learning with aerospace engineering characteristics！

instructors.name: Ping Xu;Xiulei Zhang;Haosong Yue;Jing Zhang;Jin Xiao
